75332.subject: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
75332.body:
The Monthly AI Recap

Автор: Google


Автор: Google

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/latest-ai-news-we-announced-june-2026-google-zjdmc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BrqowmAqGTx%2B1d61rq6KsDA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1a7bOGbsyirck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr2hcst7~nx-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr2hcst7-nx
  
This month was about creating a more unified environment where AI delivers help naturally throughout your day. With the debut of Android 17 and local models like Gemma 4 12B running right on your laptop, our June updates reflect a vision where technology acts as an intuitive partner and helps you reach your goals. Whether you’re a small business owner trying to get your shop noticed, a student setting up a study schedule or a researcher tackling climate challenges, these updates handle the complex logistics so you can focus on what matters most. Try Gemma 4 12B, our latest open model. Gemma 4 12B brings smart AI agents directly to your laptop. It runs locally using just 16GB of memory, combining a novel unified architecture with vision and native voice processing in a single streamlined system. This gives you advanced reasoning and private workflows on everyday hardware without sacrificing speed. Experience computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash. We integrated computer use into Gemini 3.5 Flash, allowing you to build custom agents that can see, reason and take action across desktop, mobile and browser environments. The update improves performance for long-horizon and enterprise automation tasks, like continuous software testing and knowledge work. Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash. To make it faster and easier to experiment, refine and scale your ideas, we've launched two major updates. First, Nano Banana 2 Lite is now available and it’s our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet. Second, we're bringing Gemini Omni Flash to APIs in public preview, introducing a natively multimodal model for enterprises and developers to build custom, dynamic video workflows for the very first time. Check out what's new in Android 17. Android 17 is packed with features like floating app windows for faster multitasking, Screen Reactions for picture-in-picture recording, an optimized layout for foldable gaming and more. You’ll also get more peace of mind with new security upgrades, including the ability to lock a missing phone using your biometrics. These updates are rolling out first to Pixel devices, followed by other eligible Android devices throughout 2026. Plus, take a look at our new personalization and safety features in June’s Android Drop. Discover the June Pixel Drop. We rolled out new features and Gemini upgrades designed to ma

75331.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Robinhood Chain goes live
75331.body:
Venice AI raises $65M | Standard Chartered sees MORPHO at $60 | Ethereum Institutional launches with Joe Lubin backing | Trump-backed American Bitcoin sets 1-for-15 reverse stock split |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Daniel Kuhn | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Wednesday! *Bitcoin* is up over 2% to $60,200 as most crypto prices turn green. The top 10 tokens by market cap are all up on the day, except *HYPE* , which is still up 151% year-to-date.

In today's newsletter, *Robinhood Chain* debuts alongside a slate of crypto integrations, *Venice AI* raises $65 million, *Standard Chartered* says *MORPHO* could run to $60, *Ethereum Institutional* nonprofit launches with backing from Joe Lubin, and more.

Meanwhile, Trump-backed American Bitcoin sets a 1-for-15 reverse stock split ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406941/trump-backed-american-bitcoin-1-for-15-reverse-stock-split-maintain-nasdaq-listing?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) in a bid to maintain its Nasdaq listing.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🕯️ Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/406918/robinhood-chain-goes-live-mainnet-alongside-24-7-tokenized-stocks-lighter-perps-planned-crypto-agentic-trading?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Robinhood Chain, an Ethereum Layer 2 built on Arbitrum, officially launched on public mainnet with day-one partners including Uniswap for liquidity, Pleiades for prop trading, plus integrations with Alchemy, BitGo, and Chainlink, according to a major announcement from the firm.

* Eligible users in 120+ countries can now trade 24/7 Stock Tokens on-chain via Robinhood Wallet; these tokenized debt securities provide economic exposure to stocks/ETFs and are usable in DeFi lending/collateral (unavailable in the U.S. and certain regions).
* A revamped Robinhood Wallet also added access to perpetual futures via the Ethereum-based Lighter DEX in selected jurisdictions, with $11 million in LIT tokens committed for community rewards and bonus points for Robinhood users.
* The company’s global expansion announced Wednesday includes official launch in Canad

75329.subject: Google Cloud Platform & APIs: платіж відхилено для домену 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD
75329.body:
Google Cloud Platform & APIs


Ваша фінансова установа відхилила платіж із Вашого рахунку Mastercard  • •  
• • 5159, зв’язаного з обліковим записом Google Cloud Platform & APIs, для  
домену 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD від 1 лип. 2026 р.. Указано таку причину:
На вашому рахунку недостатньо коштів для цієї трансакції.

Сервіс може працювати ще певний час. Проте щоб продовжити користуватися ним  
у майбутньому, Вам потрібно зв’язатися зі своєю фінансовою установою та  
вирішити проблему. Після цього оновіть дані про основний спосіб оплати та  
сплатіть усі заборгованості.

Щоб оновити або змінити основний спосіб оплати:

  Увійдіть в обліковий запис Google Cloud Console  
<https://auth.cloud.google/select-session?flow=unified&continueUrl=https://console.cloud.google/>.

  Відкрийте Меню навігації консолі й виберіть Billing (Платежі).  Якщо у вас  
кілька платіжних облікових записів Google Cloud, дотримуйтесь інструкцій  
нижче.  Виберіть Go to linked billing account (Перейти до зв’язаного  
платіжного облікового запису), щоб керувати платежами Google Cloud для  
поточного проєкту.
  Натисніть Manage billing accounts (Керувати платіжними обліковими  
записами), щоб вибрати інший платіжний обліковий запис Google Cloud.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Довідковий центр<https://support.google.com/cloud/#topic=6288636>

Зв’язатися з  
нами<https://support.google.com/cloud/contact/cloud_platform_billing>

Ідентифікатор клієнта Google Cloud Platform:  01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD
Ідентифікатор платіжного профілю:  5477-1873-1527

Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

Ми надіслали Вам це обов’язкове службове сповіщення, щоб повідомити про  
важливі зміни в Google Cloud Platform & APIs або Вашому обліковому записі.

Google

75328.subject:
Action required: your billing account 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD is past
 due or has invalid payment information.
75328.body:
Google Cloud Platform Go to my console »





Action required


Dear Google customer,


You are receiving this email because you are a Google Cloud Platform,  
Firebase, or API customer.


Our records indicate that your billing account: 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD is  
past due or does not have valid payment information associated with it.  
This may happen if your credit card has expired or was cancelled, and we  
haven't received valid payment information from you.

Please update your billing account with valid payment information by  
following this link:

https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD/settings


Failure to make payments may result in suspension and/or termination of  
your billing account and the related Project(s) or Service(s). Note that  
some services might already be impacted. If you have already updated your  
payment information, please disregard this message.

If you have any questions please contact us using this form:  
https://support.google.com/code/contact/cloud_platform_billing







The Google team





Google Plus Twitter Blogger



© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform, Firebase, APIs, or to your  
account.

75304.subject: POZVÁNKA
75304.body:
Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,

rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, prosím 
pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne našli 
prienik v kalendároch?
Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.

Ďakujem!
S pozdravom
-- 

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]



Links:
------
[1] http://www.bukovinakosice.sk

75256.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
75256.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/3984b4dc7231193fbaf225b40bf3c09d4fbaa2ff/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.
